title: AMD ships Helios rack with 2nm MI455X to challenge Nvidia
summary: AMD put its Helios rack into production — 72 2nm MI455X GPUs plus 256-core Venice CPUs per rack — with OpenAI, Microsoft, Meta and Oracle lining up.
body:
AMD used its Advancing AI 2026 keynote in San Francisco to move from selling chips to selling systems. Helios, its first rack-scale AI platform, is now in production: each liquid-cooled, OCP-compliant double-wide rack combines 72 Instinct MI455X accelerators with 18 sixth-generation EPYC "Venice" CPUs and Pensando networking, delivering 31TB of HBM4, 1.4PB/s of aggregate memory bandwidth and roughly 2.9 exaFLOPS of FP4 inference compute. Shipments begin in Q3 2026.

## Two 2nm chips

The MI455X is AMD's first GPU on TSMC's 2nm process — 320 billion transistors across chiplets, 432GB of HBM4 and 23.3TB/s of memory bandwidth. AMD claims 50 percent more memory capacity than Nvidia's competing Rubin rack and up to 30 percent more inference tokens per dollar. Venice, the first high-performance server CPU on 2nm, packs up to 256 Zen 6c cores and 203 billion transistors at 5GHz-plus clocks. CEO Lisa Su told the audience AMD now takes 46 percent of server-CPU revenue — near parity with Intel.

## The buyers are named

What separates this launch from past AMD accelerator cycles is the customer list. Microsoft will deploy Helios at scale on Azure in the second half of 2026 — the first hyperscaler commitment. OpenAI's first Helios deployment, part of its previously announced 6GW agreement, is slated for Q4. Meta is validating Venice and testing Helios; Oracle and several neoclouds are also in line. The event came a day after AMD and Anthropic unveiled a 2-gigawatt Instinct deal that includes an AMD equity investment of up to $5 billion in the lab.

Why it matters: Nvidia's dominance has rested partly on the fact that nobody else sold a complete rack-scale system buyers could deploy without assembling parts themselves. Helios ends that — same-generation silicon, full-stack integration, and named hyperscaler and frontier-lab customers with committed timelines. Whether AMD's 30-percent-per-dollar claim survives independent benchmarking, the second source the industry has demanded for three years now exists in production form.
title_zh: AMD Helios 机架量产：72 颗 2nm MI455X 正面挑战英伟达
summary_zh: AMD 在 Advancing AI 2026 上把 Helios 机架推入量产——2nm MI455X 加 256 核 Venice CPU，微软、OpenAI、Meta、甲骨文都已排队。
body_zh:
AMD 在旧金山 Advancing AI 2026 大会上完成了从卖芯片到卖系统的转身。首个机架级 AI 平台 Helios 宣布进入量产：每个液冷、符合 OCP 规范的双宽机架集成 72 颗 Instinct MI455X 加速器、18 颗第六代 EPYC "Venice" CPU 和 Pensando 网络方案，合计 31TB HBM4、1.4PB/s 内存带宽、约 2.9 exaFLOPS 的 FP4 推理算力，2026 年三季度开始交付。

## 两颗 2nm 芯片

MI455X 是 AMD 首款采用台积电 2nm 工艺的 GPU——3200 亿晶体管、432GB HBM4、23.3TB/s 显存带宽。AMD 宣称显存容量比英伟达同代 Rubin 机架多 50%，每美元推理 token 产出最多高 30%。Venice 则是首款 2nm 高性能服务器 CPU，最高 256 个 Zen 6c 核心、2030 亿晶体管、频率超 5GHz。苏姿丰在主题演讲中透露，AMD 服务器 CPU 收入份额已达 46%，与英特尔几乎平起平坐。

## 买家名单是关键

与以往 AMD 加速器发布不同，这次客户是点名的：微软将在 2026 下半年在 Azure 上规模部署 Helios，是首个做出承诺的超大规模云厂商；OpenAI 的首批 Helios 部署（此前 6GW 协议的一部分）定在四季度；Meta 正在验证 Venice 并测试 Helios；甲骨文和多家新兴云厂商也在排队。发布会前一天，AMD 与 Anthropic 刚公布 2 吉瓦 Instinct 部署协议，并附带 AMD 对 Anthropic 至多 50 亿美元的战略投资。

为什么重要：英伟达的统治力有一部分来自"只有它卖整机架"——买家无需自己攒系统。Helios 终结了这一点：同代工艺的芯片、全栈整合、点名的超大规模云与前沿实验室客户和明确时间表。"每美元多 30%"的说法还有待独立评测检验，但行业喊了三年的"第二供应商"，如今真的以量产形态存在了。
